scripts.dev:all: concurrently "npm run dev:ai-workforce" "npm run dev:employee-portal" "npm run dev:optinxt" "npm run dev:peoplestat"
scripts.build:all: npm --workspace=ai-workforce run build && npm --workspace=ai-workforce-employee-portal run build && npm --workspace=optinxt-1 run build
scripts.lint:all: npm --workspace=ai-workforce-employee-portal run lint && npm --workspace=optinxt-1 run lint
